summary: Frontend-only testing of GummyText - WebSocket real-time messaging and P0 back button fix. All 8 features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: P0 FIX: Back arrow on Choose Area Code page (Step 1) navigates to Dashboard (/dashboard)
WebSocket connection establishes when user logs in (console shows 'WebSocket connected')
Real-time messaging works via WebSocket - messages sent and received instantly
Chat screen shows connection status indicator (green Wifi icon next to contact number)
Messages tab shows 'Real-time' indicator when WebSocket connected (top right corner)
User can send messages and they appear instantly with optimistic UI
Login and authentication flow works with test2@gummytext.com / Test123456
Number selection multi-step navigation works correctly (Step 1 -> Step 2 -> Step 1)
Dashboard displays phone number (681) 261-4963 and credits (24)
Twilio integration showing live numbers with 'Live Numbers from Twilio' badge
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test user with activated number
context_for_next_testing_agent: All WebSocket and real-time messaging features verified working. P0 fix for back button navigation confirmed. User test2@gummytext.com has activated number (681) 261-4963 with 23-24 credits. WebSocket reconnects automatically if connection drops.

back_arrow_p0_fix.details: Line 213 in NumberSelection.js - navigate('/dashboard') correctly navigates to dashboard when on Step 1

websocket_connection.details: WebSocket connects at wss://sweet-design-3.preview.emergentagent.com/api/ws/chat with JWT token

realtime_messaging.details: Messages sent via WebSocket appear instantly with optimistic UI updates

chat_connection_indicator.details: Green Wifi icon visible next to contact number in chat header when connected

messages_tab_realtime_indicator.details: 'Real-time' text with Wifi icon visible in top right of MessagesTab component

login_authentication.details: Login with email/password works, redirects to dashboard, WebSocket connects automatically

number_selection.details: Area code search, number selection, multi-step navigation all working with Twilio integration
